name: HWR_ESS_ALERT_B
description: This table will be used to store main information of the hwr ess job evoked alerts

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the wellness ess job alert table

columns.Name: ALERT_OBJECT_ATTRS
columns.Comments: All attribues related to hwr alert domain objects will be mapped to this column in a separated fashion.

columns.Name: ALERT_MAP_ATTRS
columns.Comments: All alert map attributes related to hwr alert will be mapped to this column in a separated fashion.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_USERNAME
columns.Comments: This is a username of hwr alert.

columns.Name: IS_SENT
columns.Comments: This indicates if the alert is sent or not. 0 --> not sent; 1 --> sent.

columns.Name: HWR_ALERT_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: HWR_ALERT_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: HWR_ALERT_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: HWR_ALERT_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
